framework.name: Network Tokenization
framework.description: Replacing static card numbers with programmable tokens that contain transaction rules (merchant restrictions, amount limits, time constraints). Tokens validate transaction 'DNA' without human authentication. This is Visa/Mastercard's actual technical approach to enabling autonomous payments.
framework.raw_quote: These aren't just numbers. They are pieces of code, with rules. A token can be programmed to work only at your grocery store, only for amounts under $20, and only on Tuesdays.
